title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as LLM and embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) for chatting with local models, comparable to ChatGPT interface.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama providing fluent API and model management.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for integrating Ollama models into Rails or standalone Ruby apps.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive terminal UI (TUI) client for Ollama written in Rust for fast keyboard-driven chats.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub-Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack by deepset integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Community Camunda Connectors that invoke Ollama models inside BPMN processes for AI tasks.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama chat and completion endpoints within no-code workflows.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-made Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama, Open-WebUI, and GPU runtime for quick local labs.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python example showing RAG with Ollama embeddings and LangChain vector stores.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that chats using any Ollama model and supports slash commands.

title: ollama-android
summary: Experimental Android app that talks to a local Ollama server for on-device LLM chats.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Socket-mode to answer questions with Ollama models privately.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a command to summarize or continue writing notes via local Ollama models.

title: ollama-express-api
summary: Express.js REST wrapper around Ollama that adds API-key auth and usage logging for small teams.
